text: JP Anderson Signs Landmark MOU with Vaama Village to Advance Rare Earth Mineral Development in Bonthe District. This strategic agreement represents a key step in advancing the Company's rare earth mineral exploration strategy and expanding its footprint in West Africa's emerging critical minerals sector.
